title: open letter to the fatherland
description: Lyrics from open letter to the fatherland
body:
))}}

))}}

[open letter to the father land by billy](https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/open-letter-to-the-father-land)

))}}

))}}

i was verbal, abstract, metaphorical at four years old
did you call me a liar, cheater, bullshit artist right away
or does your trigger engage when i find my strength
and it stop being cute to you
bullrushing me like you got the right of way
my red face a cue to you
and i need to say it was not ok
i learned to hold acute postures in the octagon you made
taught myself to live with you calling me wrong
calling me out when i'm in my zone, going strong
calling me names
couldn't even pause to look away when you laughed at me
still can't take it serious when i say you caring has been my catastrophe
you need to stop when i say stop
if you can't i can't turn my back to you
and i won't live like that
i'll stop coming back to you
you can't stop me even if i can't make that a fact to you
my power's not something i'm in position to prove (stop asking me)
it's what i use when i move (stop grabbing me)
and i learned real young i can't give it to you
i gotta live in my truth
been dancing a marathon
and i've come real far
without understanding the damage i took in your charge
cuz you made it about you
instead a checkin on me
i was 39 before i got help with my adhd
now i might be bipolar too
and i still gotta deal with you being you if i wanna be with you
that's on me
you think i'm a part of you, that i can't be apart from you
that's only partly true
i won't be broken hearted
if i'm departing that's the part i've guarded from being locked up or walled in
neither hardened nor gardened
nah, my break'll be hidden in the shadows surrounding my vision
a combination of my make up and your demands for attention
so when you compliment my make up
it fucks up my complexion
when i wanna look good i avoid your presence
when you send me presents i sigh and start sweating
like you always say about this time
let me know when you get it
i need to know when you get it
that's why i sent it


))}}

ps
addressed to my dad specifically
when you make the same case for stayin true to the knicks
as you did about not moving to texas to be next to me when you lost custody
and then laugh and/or come at me when that history comes up for me
it fucks with me
sincerely
billy

))}}

))}}

[mic check | bjorn vader](https://bjornvader.bandcamp.com/track/mic-check)
